agent_card_seeds.name: TowerRelay
agent_card_seeds.notes: Public ClawNet agent card verified live. The card resolves to a public A2A base endpoint.

agent_card_seeds.name: Bartleby
agent_card_seeds.notes: Public ClawNet agent card verified live. Useful as a direct A2A discovery seed.

agent_card_seeds.name: clawclaw
agent_card_seeds.notes: Public ClawNet agent card verified live. The card exposes a public A2A base endpoint.

registry_hubs.name: ClawNet root catalog
registry_hubs.notes: Public JSON list of live ClawNet agents. Useful as a future registry input or manual scouting surface.

registry_hubs.name: Well Knowns Agent
registry_hubs.notes: Public discovery-focused agent card and registry surface. Good for manual seed expansion and agent discovery research.

registry_hubs.name: A2A Registry AgentCard
registry_hubs.notes: Registry publishes a public agent card. Docs point agents to api.a2a-registry.org for public agent search.

registry_hubs.name: A2A Registry public search
registry_hubs.notes: Public registry search returns manifest URLs for live agents without auth and is useful for free seed expansion.
